A '''Sith Destroyer''' was a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] used by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] during the [[New Sith Wars]]. The ship type was armed with at least a broadside [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] artillery and could overpower several battleships. One such vessel was the [[Nightfall (Sith Destroyer)|''Nightfall'']], [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Lord]] [[Skere Kaan|Kaan's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]. It led a fleet of [[Corsair battleship]]s and [[Dreadnaught cruiser|Sith Dreadnaughts]] in the [[First Battle of Ruusan]].<ref name="DB:PTD" />

==Appearances==
